images.name: bike_art_base.jpg
images.description: bicycle art photo, 2.4MB, rembg mask cached (u2net)

images.name: benchmark_result.jpg
images.description: bar chart image, 189KB, no rembg (not installed) -> full mode fallback
images.note: rembg not installed in this environment; fell back to BG_MODE=full. Low fg_entropy expected for chart with large uniform areas.

images.name: synthetic.png
images.description: 256x256 generated geometric image (circles, rectangles, radial lines), no rembg -> full mode
images.note: rembg not installed; full mode. Low-complexity geometric image produces low entropy.

summary: Mode C flicker_std PASS is NOT consistent across n=3 images. Only image 1 (bike_art_base.jpg, with u2net mask) passes. Images 2 and 3 fail because rembg is not installed in this environment, causing BG_MODE fallback to 'full' (no foreground isolation), which inflates flicker and collapses entropy. The flicker_std=0.0086 claim is valid for the intended Mode C (rembg + braille) but requires rembg to be installed.
